memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Corbet (1383-1420)
memoryArtifacts.description: Robert Corbet (1383-1420) of Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, was an English soldier, politician and landowner who represented Shropshire twice in the House of Commons of England. A retainer of Thomas Fitz …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mallory於1375年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾沙波利時，他的父親Anketin Malore Sir35歲，母親Alice de Driby35歲。他於大約1400年與de Papworth在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里結婚。他去世於1445年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾雪登享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mallory was born in 1375, in Shawbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anketin Malore Sir, was 35 and his mother, Alice de Driby, was 35. He married de Papworth about 1400, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1445, in Shelton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé de Papworth environ 1400, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1445, à Shelton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Malloryが1375年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシャウブリーで生まれた時，父Anketin Malore Sirは35歳，母Alice de Dribyは35歳であった。約1400年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーでde Papworthと結婚した。彼は1445年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアシェルトンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mallory(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anketin Malore Sir(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Driby(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 커크비 맬로리에서 de Papworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 셸턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mallory родился в 1375 г. в местности шавбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anketin Malore Sir было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Driby, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени de Papworth около 1400 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности шелтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
